title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Haier India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Haier India
jsonLd.description:
We at Haier India are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Howrah. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Haier India:
Haier India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haier India!
